MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Charles Pitts 415-368-2354 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court explains the tentative ruling. Plaintiff argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Episcopal Community Services of San Francisco's demurrer to 3rd amended complaint is OFF CALENDAR. CCP 430.41(a) states that "[b]efore filing a demurrer pursuant to this chapter, the demurring party shall meet and confer in person or by telephone with the party who filed the pleading that is subject to demurrer'" (emphasis added.) Paragraphs 11-12 of the declaration of Christina Forst fail to show compliance with the code. The parties are ordered to immediately meet and confer in compliance with the code. If necessary, defendants have until March 23, 2018 to file a new demurrer.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
